title: Enakku 20 Unakku 18
desc: A series of unfortunate incidents make two people part their ways in Mumbai. However, as they develop feelings for one another they begin to search for the other in Chennai.

title: Koodi Vazhnthal Kodi Nanmai
desc: Thangaraj and his wife Meenakshi take care of his brothers, Krishnan and Sivaraman. However, when the brothers get married, conflicts grow amongst the family members.

title: Aval Varuvala
desc: Divya rejects Jeeva's love due to her past with her overbearing husband. But when she finally decides to marry Jeeva, her dreaded ex-husband reappears in her life.

title: Ninaithale Inikkum
desc: Though Shiva looks forward to meeting his college friends, there is a sombre mood surrounding the reunion. Later, due to some unexpected turn of events, several dark secrets are revealed.

title: Thaamirabharani
desc: Bharani falls in love with Bhanu, but is unable to marry her due to his uncle Saravanan having an ugly history with her family. Bharani undertakes several measures to unite the two families.
